name: kotrain
description: Local-first AI coding & cowork desktop app with first-class local model support.
author: ermish

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build -w @kotrain/host && npm run build -w @kotrain/desktop
scripts.build:core: npm run build -w @kotrain/shared && npm run build -w @kotrain/core
scripts.build:web: npm run build:core && npm run build -w @kotrain/host && npm run build -w @kotrain/cli && npm run build -w @kotrain/desktop && npm run build -w @kotrain/server && npm run build -w @kotrain/cloud
scripts.cloud: npm run build:core && npm run build -w @kotrain/host && npm run build -w @kotrain/desktop && npm run build -w @kotrain/cloud && npm run start -w @kotrain/cloud
scripts.local: npm run build:core && npm run build -w @kotrain/host && npm run build -w @kotrain/desktop && npm run start -w @kotrain/desktop
scripts.web: npm run build:web && npm run start -w @kotrain/server
scripts.bundle:web: npm run build:web && npm run bundle -w @kotrain/server
scripts.test: npm run test -w @kotrain/core && npm run test -w @kotrain/cloud
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @kotrain/shared && npm run typecheck -w @kotrain/core && npm run typecheck -w @kotrain/host && npm run typecheck -w @kotrain/desktop && npm run typecheck -w @kotrain/server && npm run typecheck -w @kotrain/relay && npm run typecheck -w @kotrain/cli && npm run typecheck -w @kotrain/cloud
scripts.relay: npm run build -w @kotrain/relay && npm run start -w @kotrain/relay
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run dist -w @kotrain/desktop
